Bash(V1="C:/Users/Sherry/Desktop/Github/SoftwareDesignPattern/src/ch3_complexBV/StatePattern/v1"

find "$V1" -name "*.java" | while read f; do
  sed -i \\
    -e 's/package ch3_complexBV\\.StatePattern\\.states;/package ch3_complexBV.StatePattern.v1.states;/' \\
    -e 's/package ch3_complexBV\\.StatePattern\\.treasures;/package ch3_complexBV.StatePattern.v1.treasures;/' \\
    -e 's/package ch3_complexBV\\.StatePattern;/package ch3_complexBV.StatePattern.v1;/' \\
    -e 's/import ch3_complexBV\\.StatePattern\\.states\\./import ch3_complexBV.StatePattern.v1.states./g' \\
    -e 's/import ch3_complexBV\\.StatePattern\\.treasures\\./import ch3_complexBV.StatePattern.v1.treasures./g' \\
    -e 's/import ch3_complexBV\\.StatePattern\\.\\*/import ch3_complexBV.StatePattern.v1.*/g' \\
    "$f"
done
echo "Done")

Bash(python3 -c "
import os, glob
base = 'C:/Users/Sherry/Desktop/Github/SoftwareDesignPattern/src/ch3_complexBV/StatePattern/v1'
for f in glob.glob\(base + '/**/*.java', recursive=True\):
    with open\(f, 'rb'\) as fh:
        data = fh.read\(\)
    if data.startswith\(b'\\xef\\xbb\\xbf'\):
        with open\(f, 'wb'\) as fh:
            fh.write\(data[3:]\)
        print\('Fixed BOM:', os.path.basename\(f\)\)
print\('Done'\)
")
